message:
fix(messaging): audit + clippy cleanup for workflow/saga code and messaging module

- Audit GreenRobin's new Workflow/Saga kernel (850+ lines): SOUND
- Defensive guard for should_sample_observation(0, ratio) underflow
- Fix ok_or -> ok_or_else for lazy String allocation (3 sites)
- Fix map().unwrap_or() -> map_or in push_evidence
- Fix manual_let_else in complete_compensation
- Fix trivially_copy_pass_by_ref for WorkflowStepStatus methods
- Add clippy allows: too_many_arguments (3), too_many_lines (2),
  struct_excessive_bools, result_large_err (3), cast_precision_loss (7)
- Fix assigning_clones -> clone_from (2 sites in service.rs, 1 in fabric.rs)
- Fix redundant clone in fabric.rs rebalance error path
- Fix derive_partial_eq_without_eq on PropagationEnvelope
- Fix manual_let_else in control.rs can_send_incremental
- Fix ok_or -> ok_or_else in cut.rs rehearsal
- Fix Option<&T> signature in explain.rs reply_space_signature
- Fix items_after_statements in privacy.rs (move const to fn scope top)
- Fix significant_drop_tightening with explicit drop in fabric.rs
- synthesis.rs: explicit branch prefix passing (already correct)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
